display.purpose: Hero headlines over photography, one per page.

headline.purpose: Section titles at weight 400; scale carries hierarchy.

label.purpose: Eyebrows, buttons, nav. Montserrat caps, 0.2em tracking.

shadows.name: floating-panel
shadows.purpose: Floating UI above photography (booking bar, chat panel). Only sanctioned shadow.

motion.name: ease-luxury
motion.purpose: Default easing for all reveals and hovers.

motion.name: duration-reveal
motion.purpose: Scroll fades and hero image reveal.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Dark CTA for booking bars and dark sections.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #1C1917; color: #fff; height: 44px; padding: 0 24px; font-family: Montserrat, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; border: none; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.25,0.1,0.25,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #C17A56; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1C1917; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Sage Button
components.css: .ds-btn-sage { background: #5B7B6A; color: #fff; padding: 20px 48px; font-family: Montserrat, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.25,0.1,0.25,1); } .ds-btn-sage:hover { background: #C17A56; } .ds-btn-sage:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1C1917; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text CTA
components.description: Quiet-luxury text link; hairline grows from center on hover.
components.css: .ds-cta-underline { position: relative; color: #1C1917; font-family: Montserrat, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; padding-bottom: 4px; } .ds-cta-underline::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: -2px; left: 50%; right: 50%; height: 1px; background: currentColor; transition: left 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.25,0.1,0.25,1), right 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.25,0.1,0.25,1); } .ds-cta-underline:hover::after { left: 0; right: 0; }

components.name: Booking Input
components.description: Underline-only field used in the availability bar.
components.css: .ds-booking-label { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; font-family: Montserrat, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.2em; color: #4A4541; } .ds-booking-input { background: transparent; border: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #C4B9AE; padding: 12px 0; width: 220px; font-family: Lato, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #1C1917; transition: border-color 0.3s ease; } .ds-booking-input:focus { outline: none; border-bottom-color: #1C1917; }

components.name: Nav Link
components.html: SUITESWEDDINGSEXPERIENCES
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 32px; background: #F7F2EC; padding: 16px 24px; } .ds-nav-link { position: relative; color: #1C1917; font-family: Montserrat, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-link::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: -4px; left: 50%; right: 50%; height: 1px; background: #C17A56; transition: left 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.25,0.1,0.25,1), right 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.25,0.1,0.25,1); } .ds-nav-link:hover::after { left: 0; right: 0; }

components.name: Editorial Label
components.css: .ds-eyebrow { font-family: Montserrat, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #8A7D72; }

components.name: Image Card
components.description: Photographic card with slow scale hover, no shadow at rest.
components.html:
SUITE

La Luna

A corner of the house where morning light lingers longest.
components.css: .ds-card { width: 300px; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; background: #F0EAE3; } .ds-card-img { height: 200px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #C4A289, #C17A56); transition: transform 0.7s cubic-bezier(0.25,0.1,0.25,1); } .ds-card:hover .ds-card-img { transform: scale(1.04); } .ds-card-body { padding: 24px; } .ds-card-eyebrow { font-family: Montserrat, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.2em; color: #8A7D72; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 400; color: #1C1917; margin: 8px 0; } .ds-card-text { font-family: Lato, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.7; color: #4A4541; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: Every screen should feel like stepping off a cobblestone street into a quiet colonial courtyard at golden hour. The system is editorial and photographic: full-bleed imagery carries the emotion, type set in a calm serif carries the story, and the interface itself stays nearly invisible. Density is low, whitespace is generous, motion is slow. This system explicitly rejects SaaS landing-page conventions, OTA booking-site density and urgency, Inter-everything tech minimalism, purple gradients, and cards-in-cards. It is a magazine feature about a house, with a reservation desk at the end.
keyCharacteristics: Photography-first, full-bleed heroes on every page
Warm tinted neutrals (linen, espresso) with sage and terracotta as committed accents
Serif display type at light weight, tracked-out uppercase labels
Hairline rules (1px) as the primary structural device
Glass panels reserved for overlays on photography, never on flat surfaces

rules.name: The Plaster Rule
rules.body: No pure white, no pure black, anywhere. Backgrounds are linen-family, text is espresso. #FFF appears only inside glass overlays and on-color button text.

rules.name: The Jewel Box Rule
rules.body: The jewel tones exist for rare editorial moments tied to their subject. Never structural, never on more than one element per viewport.

rules.name: The One Serif Voice Rule
rules.body: Cormorant Garamond never appears below 1.25rem and never in UI controls. If it's clickable and small, it's Montserrat; if it's reading copy, it's Lato.

rules.name: The Diacritics Rule
rules.body: Every loaded weight includes latin-ext. Spanish is a first language here.

rules.name: The Glass-on-Photo Rule
rules.body: Glassmorphism is permitted only on top of photography. Glass on a flat linen background is prohibited.

dos: Do lead every page with photography and let UI recede.
Do use hairline 1px rules and whitespace as the primary structure.
Do keep motion slow and exponential: fades, 600-1800ms, ease-out; respect prefers-reduced-motion.
Do maintain EN/ES dictionary key parity on every copy change.
Do keep touch targets at 44px minimum; the mobile guest is on a mid-range Android.
donts: Don't build SaaS landing-page patterns: feature grids, hero metrics, gradient CTAs, identical icon-card grids.
Don't import OTA booking-site urgency: countdown timers, 'Only 2 rooms left,' dense comparison tables.
Don't use purple gradients, neon accents, gradient text, or Inter-everything minimalism.
Don't nest cards in cards, or use border-left/right stripes thicker than 1px as accents.
Don't use pure #000 or #FFF on surfaces (The Plaster Rule).
Don't use Ken Burns zooms, word-by-word text reveals, bounce/elastic easing, or custom cursors.
Don't write corporate hospitality copy ('world-class amenities,' 'nestled in the heart of').
